description_long: This object is a Casio scientific calculator, featuring a rectangular body with a slightly curved back and a prominent LCD display at the top. The front face is densely populated with a grid of round, tactile buttons in various colors, including black, gray, orange, and blue, each labeled with numbers, mathematical symbols, and function keys. The display area is bordered by a light gray frame, and the brand name 'Casio' is visible above the screen. The calculator's casing appears to be made of hard plastic, with a matte finish and some visible wear. The sides are relatively thin, and the back is plain, lacking any visible features or compartments. This device is compact and lightweight, suitable for handheld use in urban environments such as schools, offices, or on the go.
description: A Casio scientific calculator with a rectangular plastic body, LCD display, and a grid of multicolored buttons on the front. The device is compact, lightweight, and designed for handheld use.
description_view_0: The calculator is seen at an angle, highlighting the thickness of the device and the raised buttons on the front.
description_view_1: A side view showing the full length of the calculator, the button grid, and the LCD display, with the brand name visible.
description_view_2: A narrow edge-on view, revealing the slim profile and minimal side features of the calculator.
description_view_3: A direct front view displaying the entire button layout, LCD screen, and brand logo clearly.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Casio' brand logo is visible above the LCD screen on the front face, printed in white text.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen appears blank or turned off, with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: None; there are no visible camera modules or lenses on this object.
attribute_button_layout: There is a grid of round physical buttons on the front face below the screen, arranged in rows and columns, with different colors indicating function keys, numbers, and operations.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: None; the calculator does not have any external case, cover, or protective accessory.
